websocket:on-socket-closed.doc:name: On Socket Closed
websocket:on-socket-closed.doc:description: Trigger when Opera closes the connection

java:invoke.doc:name: Read numeric close code
java:invoke.doc:description: Reads the Opera provided socket close code

os:contains.doc:name: Has current socket id?
os:contains.doc:description: Check whether this socket was the tracked one

choice.doc:name: Clear current socket id if present
choice.doc:description: Clear the tracked socket only if it was this one

when.doc:description: This closed socket was the tracked one, so clear the stored socket id

choice.doc:name: Update lastConnectedAt if record exists
choice.doc:description: Record when the connection last dropped

when.doc:description: A saved Offset exists, so stamp it with the disconnect time

choice.doc:name: Route by close code (originalCode)
choice.doc:description: Decide how to react based on why the socket closed

when.doc:description: Token expired/invalid, so reconnect immediately with a fresh token

logger.doc:name: Log 4401
logger.message: Token expired/invalid (4401); fetching new token and reconnecting.

flow-ref.name: connect-subflow
flow-ref.doc:name: Reconnect now
flow-ref.doc:description: Reconnect immediately with a fresh token

when.doc:description: Chain not enabled / bad chainCode, so halt and stop retrying (config problem)

logger.doc:name: Log 4403 halt
logger.doc:description: Log a fatal configuration error and stop retrying
logger.message: Chain not enabled / bad chainCode (4403) - halting, this is a configuration problem. Not retrying.

when.doc:description: Another consumer holds the lock, so reconnect after a 2min+jitter backoff

logger.doc:name: Log 4409
logger.doc:description: Log that another consumer already holds the connection
logger.message: Single-Consumer Lock held (4409); scheduling reconnect after wait+jitter.

set-variable.doc:name: Compute wait (2min + jitter)
set-variable.doc:description: Wait ~2 minutes plus jitter before retrying

when.doc:description: Service timeout, so reconnect after a short 15s wait
Abnormal closure, so reconnect after a brief 4s wait

os:contains.doc:name: Reconnect already scheduled?
os:contains.doc:description: Check if a delayed reconnect (e.g. token refresh) already owns this close

choice.doc:name: Reconnect inline unless already scheduled or connecting
choice.doc:description: Only connect inline if nothing else already owns the reconnect

when.doc:description: Nothing else is connecting or scheduled, so reconnect right away

logger.doc:name: Log default close deferred
logger.doc:description: Log that a delayed reconnect already owns this close
logger.message: Close code #[vars.closeCode] (e.g. 1000/1001); a reconnect is already scheduled or in progress, deferring to it.

set-variable.doc:name: Compute not-before timestamp
set-variable.doc:description: Work out the earliest retry time

scheduler.doc:name: Connection manager poll
scheduler.doc:description: Poll for a due reconnect, or cold-start if nothing is connected

os:contains.doc:name: Has pending reconnect?
os:contains.doc:description: Check if a reconnect is queued

os:contains.doc:name: Connect already in progress?
os:contains.doc:description: Check if a connect attempt is already running

choice.doc:name: Reconnect due, or cold start / self-heal
choice.doc:description: Only act if a reconnect is queued and nothing else is connecting

when.doc:description: A reconnect is queued and nothing else is connecting, so check if it's due

os:retrieve.doc:name: Retrieve not-before timestamp
os:retrieve.doc:description: Load the earliest allowed retry time

choice.doc:name: If due now
choice.doc:description: Wait until the retry time has actually arrived

when.doc:description: The backoff wait has elapsed, so attempt the reconnect now

logger.doc:name: Log reconnecting
logger.doc:description: Log that the wait is over and reconnecting now

try.doc:name: Attempt reconnect
try.doc:description: Try to reconnect, retrying later on failure

os:remove.doc:name: Clear reconnect-pending flag (success)
os:remove.doc:description: Reconnect succeeded, clear the pending flag

on-error-continue.doc:name: Connect failed - keep pending, back off one interval
on-error-continue.doc:description: Reconnect failed, so try again on the next tick

logger.doc:name: Log reconnect failure
logger.doc:description: Log why the reconnect attempt failed
logger.message: Reconnect attempt failed (#[error.description]); leaving pending and retrying next interval.

choice.doc:name: Cold start / self-heal if idle
choice.doc:description: Connect only when nothing else is already trying to

when.expression: #[not vars.hasSocket and not vars.connecting and not vars.hasPending]
when.doc:description: Nothing is connected, connecting, or pending, so open the stream

logger.doc:name: Cold start / self-heal connecting
logger.doc:description: Log that the manager is opening a new connection
logger.message: No live Stream and no pending reconnect; connecting.
